title: Confiture unified issue/error object
description: The shared inner object embedded by every structured error/issue surface (error envelope #145, validate-config #144, preflight report #148). severity/code/message are always present; the rest are present-but-nullable. Stable contract: changes require a version bump.

severity.description: Lowercased ErrorSeverity. CRITICAL folds to "error" in the public contract.

code.description: Stable symbolic code (e.g. CONFIG_006, MIGR_106). INTERNAL_ERROR for an unexpected non-ConfiturError.

actionable.description: Suggested fix (maps from ConfiturError.resolution_hint); null when none.

migration.description: Migration version identifier when the issue is migration-specific; else null.

file.description: Filesystem path when known; else null.

line.description: 1-based line within `file` when known; else null.
